nasb.text: As for Zillah, she also gave birth to Tubal-cain, the forger of all implements of bronze and iron; and the sister of Tubal-cain was Naamah.

esv.text: Zillah also bore Tubal-cain; he was the forger of all instruments of bronze and iron. The sister of Tubal-cain was Naamah.

cnv.text: 洗拉也生了土八．該隱，就是打造各種銅鐵器具的匠人；土八．該隱的妹妹是拿瑪。

ccb.text: 洗拉生了土八·该隐，他是打造各种铜铁器具的匠人，他的妹妹叫拿玛。

csbs.text: 茜拉生了图巴·该隐，图巴·该隐是打造各样铜器铁器的工匠。他的妹妹是拿玛。
